name: Judas Iscariot
oracleText:
Menace
When Judas enters the battlefield, target opponent discards a card. If a creature card was discarded this way, create a Treasure token.
Whenever Judas attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, Judas gains first strike until end of turn.
flavorText: "Judas, betrayest thou the Son of man with a kiss?" — Luke 22:48
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Kiss of Judas" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Betrayer with a Kiss

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Kiss of Judas
classics.sourceNotes: This is the clearest classics treatment for Judas as betrayer with a kiss.
